title: Ubiquiti Mobile Router Industrial
description: The Ubiquiti Mobile Router Industrial is a compact and rugged LTE Cat4 mobile WiFi router, ideal for both indoor and outdoor IoT installations. The device is managed locally via a web interface, and the manufacturer also offers remote management through the UniFi Mobility Manager portal, which is, however, subject to a fee The router offers (2) 1 Gbps Ethernet ports, where port 1 supports input PoE for powering the router, and port 2 supports output PoE for powering another device. For connecting additional peripherals, you can also use the 2.4 GHz 2x2 MIMO WiFi 802.11b/g/n with a transmit power of up to 22 dBm. Two removable antennas on the top ensure a strong mobile network reception, while a third antenna is used for high-quality GPS signal reception. The pair of antennas on the bottom are used for local… One of the advantages of this mobile router is its wide range of input power options. In addition to PoE, you can use a USB-C connector with a 5V voltage or a 4-pin connector with a voltage range of 9 - 30V Device (2) WiFi antennas (2) LTE antennas (1) GPS antenna Wall / pole mount bracket DIN rail mount bracket Drilling template USB-C power adapter (5V / 3A) Mounting accessories
